overall.description: First-person driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a high-speed journey through Night City during a heavy rainstorm. The player navigates a futuristic vehicle with a red holographic dashboard display through wet highways, urban intersections, and tunnel approaches, with neon-lit billboards and cyberpunk architecture visible through the rain-streaked windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway through commercial district

events.description: vehicle navigates a gentle curve while maintaining high speed

agents.ego_description: speeding along the wet highway at 160-180 km/h, steering through light rain with neon-lit billboards passing on both sides

entered.detail: futuristic car interior with red holographic speedometer and control displays
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting neon lights from surrounding advertisements
large illuminated commercial advertisements with cyberpunk aesthetic
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows visible through the rain
elevated concrete highway structure crossing above the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with high-speed driving along a rain-soaked elevated highway through a cyberpunk commercial district. The vehicle's futuristic dashboard glows red as it speeds past neon billboards and glass towers at 160+ km/h, with the wet road surface creating reflective patterns from the surrounding artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp transitioning to street level

events.description: vehicle takes exit ramp, descending from elevated highway to street level
speed decreases significantly from 160 km/h to 60 km/h while navigating the curved ramp

agents.ego_description: taking an exit ramp and slowing down, steering through the curved descent while surrounded by concrete barriers

entered.detail: tall concrete barrier lining the left side of the exit ramp
red and white striped concrete barrier marking the ramp edge

segments.scene_description: The vehicle takes an exit ramp from the elevated highway, descending through a concrete channel with high retaining walls. Speed drops from 160 to around 60 km/h as the car navigates the curved ramp, transitioning from the open commercial district to a more enclosed urban street environment.

events.description: vehicle stops at red traffic light at urban intersection
vehicle accelerates from stop, making a right turn through the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating city streets at moderate speed, stopping at traffic lights and maneuvering through intersections with other vehicles present

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan crossing the intersection ahead

entered.detail: street crossing with traffic signals and crosswalk markings
tall pole with illuminated traffic signals showing red

segments.scene_description: Driving through urban streets at 40-70 km/h, the vehicle approaches and stops at a traffic light before proceeding through the intersection. The environment features commercial buildings at street level, traffic infrastructure, and other vehicles sharing the rain-soaked roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane boulevard with palm tree landscaping

events.description: vehicle accelerates from 50 km/h to over 100 km/h on the open boulevard
environment transitions from urban streets to highway approach with tunnel visible ahead

agents.ego_description: accelerating along a wide boulevard lined with palm trees, approaching a highway tunnel entrance while overtaking a blue pickup truck

notable_agents.action: blue pickup truck being overtaken on the right side

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the boulevard
dark tunnel opening with overhead lighting approaching in the distance
tall textured concrete wall separating the highway from adjacent areas

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates along a wide boulevard flanked by palm trees and concrete noise barriers, increasing speed from 50 to over 100 km/h. A blue pickup truck is overtaken on the right as the car approaches a highway tunnel entrance visible in the distance through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway tunnel with artificial lighting

events.description: vehicle enters the tunnel, transitioning from open rain to covered dry environment
lighting shifts from mixed natural/artificial to fully artificial tunnel lighting

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed through the tunnel interior, navigating the enclosed space with overhead lighting and concrete walls

entered.detail: enclosed concrete tunnel with overhead lighting fixtures and reflective road surface
smooth concrete wall with horizontal lighting strips

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the highway tunnel, transitioning from the rain-exposed boulevard to a fully enclosed concrete corridor illuminated by overhead lighting. The environment becomes completely artificial with smooth tunnel walls replacing the open sky, while the vehicle maintains speed through the covered section.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed descent from an elevated neon highway into the dense, rain-slicked streets of a futuristic urban center. It begins with a rapid surge past glowing billboards and glass towers, where the red holographic dashboard reflects against a wet road surface at extreme speeds. As the vehicle takes an exit ramp, the open skyline vanishes and the camera descends through a narrow concrete channel, causing the pace to slow as the environment becomes more enclosed. The scene then shifts into the city's street-level grid, navigating through commercial districts and traffic infrastructure. Finally, the movement culminates as the vehicle slows to a halt at a rain-streaked intersection before proceeding forward into the urban traffic.

The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive that transitions from a rain-swept open boulevard into the artificial enclosure of a highway tunnel. It begins with the vehicle accelerating rapidly along a wide road flanked by palm trees and concrete noise barriers, overtaking a blue pickup truck as the speed climbs. As the car surges forward, the rain-streaked view focuses on a distant tunnel entrance that looms ahead through the storm. The scene then shifts abruptly as the vehicle crosses the threshold, moving from the exposed elements into a fully enclosed concrete corridor. Finally, the open sky and natural landscape are replaced by smooth tunnel walls and steady overhead lighting while the vehicle maintains its momentum through the artificial passage.
